description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, clean, and deploy. In the build stage add a build_job1 job that runs echo "build job1" and a build_job2 job that runs echo "build job2". Also in the build stage add a deploy job that runs echo "deploy, password is $PASSWORD". In the test stage add a testing job that runs echo "testing envionment is $ENVIRONMENT". In the clean stage add a cleanup job that runs echo "clean up" and include a global before_script that echoes "before script".
